title: Lithium Tabulator Column Types Schema
description: Validates the coltypes.json file which defines display and editing behavior for each data type used in Tabulator tables.

description.description: Human-readable description of this column type

align.description: Horizontal text alignment in the cell

formatter.description: Tabulator formatter name or false for no formatting

formatterParams.description: Parameters passed to the Tabulator formatter

editor.description: Tabulator editor name, false for non-editable, or null

editorParams.description: Parameters passed to the Tabulator editor

sorterParams.description: Parameters passed to the Tabulator sorter

headerFilterPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for header filter input

blank.description: What to display when the value is null/undefined/empty string. Empty string means show nothing.

zero.description: What to display when the value is zero. null = show '0', empty string = show blank, or a custom string.

cssClass.description: CSS class applied to cells of this type

bottomCalc.description: Bottom calculation function (sum, avg, count, min, max) or null for none

bottomCalcFormatter.description: Formatter for the bottom calc row

bottomCalcFormatterParams.description: Parameters for the bottom calc formatter

accessorDownload.description: Custom accessor for download/export. null = use default.

width.description: Fixed column width in pixels, or null for auto
